output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?rider ?nationality WHERE {
  ?event rdfs:label ?eventLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?eventLabel) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?eventLabel) , "2007"))
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?eventLabel) , "uci mountain bike world cup"))
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?eventLabel) , "men's four cross"))
  .
  ?event wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) = 2007)
  .
  ?result wdt:P1346 ?event ; wdt:P738 "2" ; wdt:P180 ?rider .
  ?rider wdt:P27 ?nationality .
}
